The item asks for “complete cost breakdown”; since the breakdown isn’t itemized in this field but is inferable from other fields, this is borderline. Still, the item itself should contain the complete breakdown. It only provides a range statement, so not fully specified.
Thus, fully specified items: destination, travel_dates, accommodation, activities, additional_services. Transportation and total_budget are not fully specified.
